name: Cantaloupe Cooler (Fisher)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cantaloupe in half and remove the seeds.
2. Peel and slice into wedges.
3. Chop the wedges into pieces that will fit a food processor or blender.
4. Add all of the ingredients, including the cantaloupe, to the blender.
5. Puree until very smooth.
6. Refrigerate for several hours to blend the flavors.
7. Before serving, give the mixture a gentle stir.
8. Serve cold with a garnish of fresh mint or lime slices.
(Note: Each 1/2 cup serving contains: Tot Sat Cal Prot Carb Fib Fat Fat Chol Sodium - 122 3 G 25 G 1 G 2 G 1 G 6 Mg; 101 Mg From The Cookbook For The 90s by Helen V Fisher)
